LanguageData.FGL_EarlyModContentLoading: Load mod content early during game idling periods. When enabled, the game might become unresponsive during loading, but it's expected. Disable this if you encounter any issues.
LanguageData.FGL_DelayGraphicLoading: Delay graphic and icon loading to game runtime (ADVANCED). This can speed up initial loading, but may cause temporary texture issues. The delayed loading is now optimized for better performance. Only enable if you have many high-resolution texture mods and understand the trade-offs.
LanguageData.FGL_StaticAtlasesBaking: Enable static texture atlas baking (ADVANCED). Bakes textures into atlases for better in-game rendering performance (higher TPS), but slightly increases initial loading time.
LanguageData.FGL_TextureResizingExplanation: Some mods may contain a lot of high-res textures that take a long time to load. Use this to downscale hi-res textures. Original files will NOT be modified; downscaled versions are stored in a separate cache and loaded automatically on next startup. Following textures will be reduced down to target size: Building - 256px Pawn - 256px Apparel - 128px Weapon - 128px Item - 128px Plant - 128px Tree - 256px Terrain - 1024px
LanguageData.FGL_TextureResizingConfirmation: Perform texture downscaling? Downscaled textures will be cached separately; original mod files will not be modified.
LanguageData.FGL_ClearTextureCacheConfirmation: Clear all cached downscaled textures? Original textures will be used on next startup.
LanguageData.FGL_TextureCacheStatus_Empty: Texture cache is empty. No textures have been downscaled.
